Metadata.Title: Driveclub
Metadata.Name: 60 FPS with deltatime
Metadata.Note: Patch version 2.0 features deltatime. This can break some things in the game; if that is an issue, use the fixed tickrate patch instead.
Metadata.Author: illusion, u/Charlie_Muggins

Metadata.Title: Driveclub
Metadata.Name: 60 FPS with fixed tickrate
Metadata.Note: Alternative 60 FPS patch using the engine's builtin path.
Metadata.Author: kalaposfos
